• Procedural world generation with mining, building, and explosives.
  • Multiplayer support via MQTT with host election, chat, and trade dialogs.
  • Customizable UI: mobile controls, gauges, textures, and settings modal.
    Game.init()
    Sound.updateEngine()

This HTML page implements a full‑screen mining game that renders a procedurally generated map, lets players mine ores, place structures, and use items like TNT or teleporters. Multiplayer features are handled through a broker, with automatic host selection, chat, and trade dialogs, while a rich UI provides mobile controls, customizable gauges, and persistent settings.
